mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RecipeCalendar (recipe_id, recipe_title, user_id, event_date) VALUES (#{recipe_id}, #{recipe_title}, #{user_id}, #{event_date})
mapper.select: SELECT recipe_id, recipe_title AS title, event_date AS date, id FROM RecipeCalendar where user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM RecipeCalendar WHERE user_id = #{user_id} AND id = #{event_id}
